name: Sora
description: Create, edit, and extend OpenAI video generations through a Videos API or provider connector.
keywords: video IDs, downloads, thumbnails, and prompts
Check that the account still has Videos API access before assigning Sora work.
Provide OPENAI_API_KEY to the provider or local environment that will generate videos.
Add the Sora studio once the external API or connector is ready.

access.label: OpenAI Videos API
access.detail: Requires OPENAI_API_KEY and account access to the OpenAI Videos API where the agent runs. Sora 2 and the Videos API are deprecated and scheduled to shut down on September 24, 2026.

capabilities.name: API
capabilities.detail: Environment variable referenced by Sora setup notes.

capabilities.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
capabilities.detail: Environment variable referenced by Sora setup notes.

variables.label: Artifact scope
variables.value: video IDs, downloads, thumbnails, and prompts

steps.title: Confirm availability
steps.detail: Check that the account still has Videos API access before assigning Sora work.

steps.title: Connect OpenAI
steps.detail: Provide OPENAI_API_KEY to the provider or local environment that will generate videos.

steps.title: Install the building
steps.detail: Add the Sora studio once the external API or connector is ready.
